summary: A clip filmed in the Oval Office showing a man in a dark suit and tie seated in an ornate gold-and-cream upholstered armchair beside a fireplace with gilded carvings. He listens and then speaks. The framing stays close on the seated man across the sampled frames. The tweet text frames it as a question to him about strikes against Iran.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit sits in an ornate gold armchair by a carved fireplace, listening.
The same seated man speaks, mouth open mid-sentence, same framing.
